sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), address VARCHAR(255), zip_code VARCHAR(10), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, name, address, zip_code, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Alice', '123 Main St', '10001', NOW());
INSERT INTO test_data (id, name, address, zip_code, created_at) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL, '10002', NOW());
INSERT INTO test_data (id, name, address, zip_code, created_at) VALUES (3, 'Charlie', '456 Elm St', NULL, NOW());
SELECT REGEXP_INSTR(name, '[[:digit:]]', 1, 1) AS first_digit_position FROM test_data WHERE id <> 2;
SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN REGEXP_INSTR(zip_code, '^[0-9]{5}$') <> 0 THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS zip_status FROM test_data;
SELECT id, name FROM test_data WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(COALESCE(address, ''), 'Main') <> 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(name, '[aeiou]', 1, 1) <> 0 HAVING COUNT(*) <> 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT name FROM test_data WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(address, 'St', 1, 1) <> 0) AS subquery WHERE id <> 3;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (data_id INT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO additional_data (data_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Desc1'), (2, 'Desc2 with a number 123');
SELECT t1.id, t1.name, t2.description FROM test_data t1 JOIN additional_data t2 ON REGEXP_INSTR(t1.name, '[0-9]') <> 0 OR t2.data_id <> t1.id;
SELECT id, name FROM test_data WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(zip_code, '[[:digit:]]', 1, 1) <> 0 AND name <> 'Bob';
SELECT name, REGEXP_INSTR(address, 'St', 1, 1) AS street_pos FROM test_data WHERE street_pos IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM test_data WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(name, '[[:alpha:]]', 1, 1) <> 0 GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(name) <> 0;
SELECT name, REGEXP_INSTR(NULLIF(zip_code, ''), '^\d{5}$', 1, 1) AS valid_zip FROM test_data WHERE valid_zip IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (ec_id INT, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT unique_value UNIQUE(value));
INSERT INTO edge_cases (ec_id, value) VALUES (1, ''), (2, 'Extreme Value 999999999999'), (3, 'NULL'), (4, 'Valid');
SELECT ec_id, value FROM edge_cases WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(value, 'Extreme') <> 0 AND value <> 'NULL';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edge_cases WHERE REGEXP_INSTR(value, 'Val') <> 0 HAVING COUNT(*) <> 1;
